name: Thousand Island Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Empty the contents of the Heinz Chili Sauce jar into a bowl.
2. Fill an empty jar 1/4 full with Red Wine Vinegar.
3. Put the cap on and shake well. Pour the mixture into the bowl with the chili sauce.
4. Add Worcestershire sauce, pickle relish (diced), and garlic (pressed).
5. Add mayonnaise and sugar to the bowl.
6. Use a whisk to blend all ingredients together until well combined.
7. Refrigerate the dressing.
